detailed_description: This time-lapse video vividly illustrates the construction journey of a modern two-story house, beginning with the excavation of its foundation and culminating in its fully realized and landscaped form. The sequence captures key construction phases, including the pouring of the concrete foundation and columns, the erection of brick walls, plastering, and the intricate installation of exterior stone cladding, wooden accents, and windows. The video concludes with a stunning reveal of the completed house, showcasing its elegant outdoor living spaces, a tranquil swimming pool, and captivating evening illumination, all set against a dramatic mountainous and lush green landscape.

segments.why_kept: The entire video segment is the Semantic Core, as it presents a complete time-lapse narrative of a house construction from foundation to a fully completed and landscaped state, including a night-time reveal. It meticulously covers all 'Process/Labor' stages and culminates in a clear 'Reveal/Result,' making all frames essential to understanding the full scope of work and transformation. The 'No-Mistake Rule' applies as the video starts exactly with the action and ends exactly when the action stops.
